title: Quick Team Builder
subtitle: Mark enemies, your heroes, and roles — the generator will build a lineup considering tiers, synergies, and counter-picks.
selectRoleHint: Select at least one role to generate a team
noHeroesData: Hero list is empty. Please check Google Sheets connection.
noTeamsFoundDesc: No valid combinations found for the selected heroes and roles. Try changing the composition or removing some constraints.

toast.maxRolesDesc: A team can have a maximum of 6 heroes. Remove a role or generate the team first.

duo.title: Duo
duo.description: Team building for two heroes, focusing on bonds and synergies between the pair.

trio.title: Trio
trio.description: A combination of three heroes — balancing roles and team bonuses for a small group.

quadro.title: Quad
quadro.description: A four-player party — expanded role selection and counter-picks against enemies.

team.title: Full Team
team.description: Generates a 6-hero lineup based on player preferences, taking into account tiers, classes, and counter-picks.

teamups.title: Team-Ups
teamups.description: Theoretically the strongest team compositions based on team-ups and current hero meta strength.
